name: Streuselkuchen (Crumb Cake)
recipeInstructions:
--------------
Cake:
Flour; Unbleached, Unsifted - 1 cup
Sugar - 1/4 cup
Salt - 1/4 tsp
Yeast; Dry - 1 packet
Milk - 3/4 cup (heated)
Butter or Margarine - 1/2 cup
Egg; Large - 1
Topping:
-------------
Combine sugars, cinnamon, and flour. Cut in butter until the mixture is crumbly.
To make the cake, mix 1 cup of flour, sugar, salt, and yeast in a large bowl. Place milk and butter in a saucepan and heat until very warm (120 to 130 degrees F). Gradually add to dry ingredients; beat for 2 minutes. Beat in egg and additional 1 cup of flour. Beat on high speed for 2 more minutes. Stir in enough flour to make a soft but stiff batter. Spread batter into a well-greased 9-inch square cake pan. Sprinkle with topping. Let rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours. Bake at 350 degrees F. for about 45 minutes or until done. Makes 1 9-inch square cake.
